def negative_vector_store_client_created_per_request():
    rule_id = "vector_store_client_created_per_request"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "warning"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Vector-store clients created on request paths instead of reused application state."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
